event.title: event
event.description: Condition-type to execute if an event is created in the system.

function.title: function
function.description: Condition-type to execute if function is used, replaces actions v1.

request.title: request
request.description: Condition-type to execute if a request on the defined API point happens.

response.title: response
response.description: Condition-type to execute on response if a request on the defined API point happens.

all.title: all
all.description:
Define all events as condition.
 After any event is created, the execution is triggered.

event.title: event
event.description:
Define a specific event as condition.
 After this event is created, the execution is triggered.

group.title: group
group.description:
Define an event group as condition.
 After any event under this group is created, the execution is triggered.

executionTypeFilter.title: execution_type_filter
executionTypeFilter.description: Filter for executions of a certain type.

inConditionsFilter.title: in_conditions_filter
inConditionsFilter.description: Filter for executions that are executed when certain conditions are met.

targetFilter.title: target_filter
targetFilter.description: Filter for executions that include a specific target.

executionType.title: execution_type
executionType.description: Defines the type to query for.

conditions.title: conditions
conditions.description: Defines the conditions to query for.

targetIds.title: target_ids
targetIds.description: Defines the ids to query for.

activeFilter.title: active_filter
activeFilter.description: Filter the keys by their active status.

expirationDateFilter.title: expiration_date_filter
expirationDateFilter.description: Filter the keys by their expiration status.

keyIdsFilter.title: key_ids_filter
keyIdsFilter.description: Filter the keys by one or multiple ids.

all.title: all
all.description:
Define all calls as condition.
 When a call to any available service happens, the execution is triggered.

method.title: method
method.description:
Define a GRPC-method as condition.
 When a request to this method happens, the execution is triggered.

service.title: service
service.description:
Define a GRPC-service as condition.
 When a request to any method of this service happens, the execution is triggered.

all.title: all
all.description:
Define all calls as condition.
 Before a response is returned to the client from any available service,
 the execution is triggered.

method.title: method
method.description:
Define a GRPC-method as condition.
 Before a response is returned to the client from this method, the execution is triggered.

service.title: service
service.description:
Define a GRPC-service as condition.
 Before a response is returned to the client from any method of this service, the execution is triggered.

targetId.title: target_id
targetId.description: Defines the id of the target that needs to be part of the execution.

targetName.title: target_name
targetName.description: Defines the name of the target to query for.

method.title: method
method.description: Defines which text comparison method used for the name query.

inTargetIdsFilter.title: in_target_ids_filter
inTargetIdsFilter.description: Filter for targets with specific ids.

targetNameFilter.title: target_name_filter
targetNameFilter.description: Filter for targets with a specific name.

ids.title: ids
ids.description: Defines the ids to query for.

method.title: method
method.description: Defines the condition (e.g., equals, before, after) that the timestamp of the retrieved resources should match.
